committee.name: Investment Committee
committee.waitingHint: Once questioning is done, four analysts (Evidence · Consensus · Timing · Circle of Competence) each review it in the background. Results usually arrive within a minute or two.

antiConsensus.name: Consensus Analyst
antiConsensus.role: Has the market already priced it

verdict.thickness: The independent evidence so far isn't thick enough.
verdict.antiConsensus: The market is already talking about this; what you see isn't leading.
verdict.window: The timing isn't within your window.
verdict.edge: This one is beyond your current circle of competence.

signal.loadFailed: Failed to load. Pull to refresh or try again later.

inference.title: Inference
inference.failed: Inference failed for this one; it won't rerun automatically.
inference.pending: Inference results land within 30 seconds. Empty for now.

stuck.hint: ◆ Inference has been stuck for over {{seconds}}s — likely a transient LLM output glitch. You can have it retry once.
